protobufNullValue.description:
`NullValue` is a singleton enumeration to represent the null value for the
`Value` type union.

The JSON representation for `NullValue` is JSON `null`.

 - NULL_VALUE: Null value.

v1CancelExecutionResponse.description: CancelExecutionResponse is the response after cancelling an execution.

metadata.description: [Phase 2a] Standard resource metadata. Default security_level: CONFIDENTIAL (may contain sensitive I/O).

v1Execution.description: Execution represents a single run of a workflow.

v1ExecutionStatus.description: ExecutionStatus represents the lifecycle state of a workflow execution.

v1ExecutionStep.description: ExecutionStep represents a single step within a workflow execution.

v1ExecutionStepStatus.description: ExecutionStepStatus represents the lifecycle state of an individual step.

v1GetExecutionResponse.description: GetExecutionResponse is the response containing a single execution with its steps.

v1ListExecutionsResponse.description: ListExecutionsResponse is the response for listing executions.

token.description:
Opaque cursor token. Pass to the next request to get the next page.
Empty string means "start from the beginning".

v1PageToken.description:
PageToken supports cursor-based pagination for large or real-time datasets.
The token is opaque to clients — internal structure is service-defined.

nextToken.description: Token for the next page. Empty if no more results.

v1PageTokenResponse.description: PageTokenResponse is the cursor-based pagination output.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the resource was created.

deletedAt.description:
Soft-delete timestamp (null if not deleted).
For RESTRICTED resources, see SECURITY.md for physical deletion policy.

createdBy.description: Actor ID who created this resource.

updatedBy.description: Actor ID who last updated this resource.

labels.description: Arbitrary key-value labels for filtering and organization.

annotations.description: Arbitrary key-value annotations for tooling metadata.

securityLevel.description:
Security classification level for this resource (CISO directive).
Default when unspecified: treated as INTERNAL.

v1ResourceMetadata.description:
ResourceMetadata provides standard metadata for all Sirosimes resources.
Every domain entity across all products should embed this message to ensure
consistent tracking, versioning, and security classification.

Related types:
  - Actor/ActorRef (actor.proto): created_by/updated_by reference Actor IDs.
  - AuditLog (audit.proto): changes to resources are tracked via audit events.
  - SecurityLevel: controls access, encryption, and retention policies.

Default behavior for security_level:
  When security_level is UNSPECIFIED (0), domain services SHOULD treat the resource
  as INTERNAL (level 2) by default. This ensures that resources without explicit
  classification are not accidentally treated as PUBLIC. Services MAY override this
  default with stricter levels based on their domain requirements.

v1ResumeExecutionResponse.description: ResumeExecutionResponse is the response after resuming an execution.

v1RunWorkflowResponse.description: RunWorkflowResponse is the response after starting a workflow execution.

v1SecurityLevel.description:
SecurityLevel classifies data sensitivity per CISO directive (ISO 27001 aligned).

Classification guide:
  PUBLIC (1)       — Marketing content, public documentation, open-source code.
                     Encryption: transit only. Logging: optional. Retention: unlimited.
  INTERNAL (2)     — Internal wikis, team communications, non-sensitive business data.
                     Encryption: transit required. Logging: optional. Retention: 3 years.
  CONFIDENTIAL (3) — Financial reports, HR records, customer data, business strategies.
                     Encryption: transit + at-rest. Logging: required. Retention: 1 year.
                     Masking required when exposed externally.
  RESTRICTED (4)   — PII, credentials, API keys, authentication tokens, audit trails.
                     Encryption: transit + at-rest + field-level. Logging: required + tamper detection.
                     Retention: 6 months. Masking: always required.

 - SECURITY_LEVEL_PUBLIC: Open data, no access restrictions. Marketing, public docs.
 - SECURITY_LEVEL_INTERNAL: Internal use only. Team wikis, non-sensitive business data.
 - SECURITY_LEVEL_CONFIDENTIAL: Business-sensitive, need-to-know basis. Financial, HR, customer data.
 - SECURITY_LEVEL_RESTRICTED: Highest sensitivity. PII, credentials, tokens, audit trails.
